Class DeviceDsl

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.DeviceDsl
public final class DeviceDsl extends Object
Fluent builder that wraps a discovered (but not yet connected) BleDevice.

Instances are returned by ScanDsl.first() and are the bridge between the scan phase and the connection phase of the DSL.

Thread safety: not thread-safe; do not share across threads.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull BleDevice
    device()
    Returns the underlying BleDevice for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
    @NonNull String
    id()
    Returns the platform-specific identifier of the underlying device.
    @NonNull String
    name()
    Returns the advertised name of the underlying device.
    int
    rssi()
    Returns the RSSI of the underlying device at discovery time, in dBm.
    @NonNull ConnectionDsl
    thenConnect()
    Initiates a BLE connection to the wrapped device and returns a ConnectionDsl for the active session.

  • Method Details

    • name

      public @NonNull String name()
      Returns the advertised name of the underlying device.
      Returns:
      the device name; never null

    • id

      public @NonNull String id()
      Returns the platform-specific identifier of the underlying device.
      Returns:
      the device identifier; never null

    • rssi

      public int rssi()
      Returns the RSSI of the underlying device at discovery time, in dBm.
      Returns:
      RSSI in dBm

    • device

      public @NonNull BleDevice device()
      Returns the underlying BleDevice for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
      Returns:
      the device; never null

    • thenConnect

      public @NonNull ConnectionDsl thenConnect() throws BleException
      Initiates a BLE connection to the wrapped device and returns a ConnectionDsl for the active session.

      This method blocks until the connection is established and service discovery has completed.

      Returns:
      a ConnectionDsl for the active connection; never null
      Throws:
      BleException - if the connection or service discovery fails
